relationships: ber:Yeqqel-d ɣer taddart seg Tmurt n Yizwawen
ber:Amur ameqqran seg Yizwawen dehhlen Tillumẓa Taddalant n Yizwawen

ber:Yella wasmi ay teddiḍ ɣer Tmurt n Yizwawen﹖
ber:Yella wasmi ay teddid ɣer Tmurt n Yizwawen﹖
ber:Yedda netta s timmad-nnes ɣer Tmurt n Yizwawen
ber:Yeqqel-d ɣer uxxam seg Tmurt n Yizwawen
ber:Nekk seg Tmurt n Yizwawen. Ta d tamnaḍt d-yusan deg Dzayer
ber:Imawlan-inu seg Tmurt n Yizwawen, deg Zzayer
ber:A win yufan ad talsed ad tgiǧǧed ɣer Tmurt n Yizwawen
ber:Yal taddart deg Tmurt n Yizwawen tla tamesgida
ber:Yal taddart deg Tmurt n Yizwawen tesɛa tamesgida
ber:Sanda ay tetteddumt﹖ Ɣer Tmurt n Yizwawen
ber:Tamurt n Yizwawen tella d tahuskayt imir-nni
ber:Tamurt n Yizwawen ɣer-s iɣerman d ihuskayen
ber:D acu ay tellamt tettgemt deg Tmurt n Yizwawen﹖
ber:Ma ur tḥemmled ara Tamurt n Yizwawen, ffeɣ seg-s!
